posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the automation conditions, include conditions for blank columns. For example, when a column value changes, and only if the column value is/is not blank, do …
For example, I can currently check if a dropdown value equals a specific value, but I can’t check if the dropdown column is/is not blank.
It will be very much appreciated if such a feature is available for us to use.
